title: fraxinus angustifolia var. persica
intro: Fraxinus angustifolia var. persica, also known as the English or Persian manna ash, is a variety of the narrow-leaved ash tree, native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Fraxinus angustifolia var. persica are attributed to its bark, which contains glycosides and other compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Fraxinus angustifolia var. persica can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate respiratory issues.
